channel.title: Internet Explorer on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Internet Explorer on Have an average day :|

item.title: IE HTTP 500 ERROR
item.description: I’ve been going crazy trying to fix a problem with uploading a file over a https secured ftp site for one of my uses. I contacted their help desk and it looks like KB2585542 broke a few things. I removed names and URLs on the rest of the post. Per our conversation: Recent Microsoft patches (Microsoft KB2585542) on windows 7 has broken the IE upload facility for our secureftp environment. On Microsoft TechNet, many users are discussing their respective websites broken.
